cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Ji. I need to talk to someone about what's been going on.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Aamir. What seems to be the matter? You can share with me, I'm all ears.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's just... I had a big argument with my family, and I'm feeling really down. I don't know how to deal with it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm so sorry to hear that, Aamir. It sounds like you're going through a tough time. Would you like some advice or just someone to listen?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Just someone to listen, please. I don't know, it's all just feeling really overwhelming.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Aamir. I'm here for you. Sometimes talking about it can help. What happened with your family?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's just... we had a disagreement about my future plans, and it escalated. Now everyone's not talking to each other.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I see. Well, Aamir, it's great that you're recognizing the need to talk about this. Have you considered taking some time for yourself, doing things that you enjoy?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, I think that's a good idea. I just need to clear my head and figure some things out.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 120s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A person calls their friend to tell them about a personal crisis (e.g., a breakup, a family argument) and seeks emotional support.
